title: Cuneiform Tablet #0532: Middle Babylonian Loan Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Loan Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records loan contract matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
